title: Blast radius
noDownstream: {count} changed symbol(s), no downstream callers found.

freshness.staleTooltipEmpty: This map was built from the index of {branch}, not this PR — no downstream callers were found there, but callers or symbols this PR adds may not appear.
freshness.staleTooltipBase: This PR targets a branch other than {branch}, which the map was built from — its impact map may be incomplete for this base.
freshness.noDownstreamCaveat: {count} changed symbol(s), no downstream callers found in the index of {branch} — this may miss impact introduced by this PR.
freshness.noDownstreamCaveatNoBranch: {count} changed symbol(s), no downstream callers found in the index — this may miss impact introduced by this PR.
